# Wena Self Photo Studio

Wena Self Photo Studio is a self photo studio in Tugumulyo, Kabupaten Musi Rawas, Sumatera Selatan, Indonesia.

## Official Links

- [Official website](https://wena.my.id/)
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/wena.selfphoto/)
- [Booking](https://linktr.ee/wenastudiofoto)
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/6285369792229)
- [Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Wena+Self+Photo+Studio/@-3.1822273,102.9453031,17z/data=!4m6!3m5!1s0x8f5e73d27426d523:0xd4e4910b44405ffa!8m2!3d-3.1820559!4d102.9475669!16s%2Fg%2F11svp9_5lz)

## Services

- Self photo studio
- Photobox
- Aquabox
- Solo, couple, bestie, group, family, birthday, and personal photo sessions

## Location

G1, Mataram, Kecamatan Tugumulyo, Kabupaten Musi Rawas, Sumatera Selatan 31662, Indonesia.

Nearby service areas include Tugumulyo, Musi Rawas, Lubuklinggau, Megang Sakti, and Purwodadi.

## Price Range

Starts from Rp 35K. Main package information on the website includes 15-minute sessions, softfiles, printed photo strips, and package options up to Rp 140K.

## Opening Hours

- Monday-Friday: 10:00-17:00
- Saturday-Sunday: 10:00-18:00

## Canonical Page

[https://wena.my.id/](https://wena.my.id/)
